node_10.excerpt: The new crypto / ecdh package provides explicit support for Elliptic Curve Diffie - Hellman key

node_14.excerpt: The language specification now defines the exact order in which array elements and struct fields are
node_14.fallbackText: The language specification now defines the exact order in which array elements and struct fields are compared . This clarifies what happens in case of panics during comparisons.
node_14.textQuote: The language specification now defines the exact order in which array elements and struct fields are compared . This clarifies what happens in case of panics during comparisons.
